name: start_g4_rule
title: Start G4 Rule
description: Starts a G4 rule execution with the provided parameters.

driverSession.description: The unique session ID associated with the current browser session. This ID is used to retrieve the appropriate browser driver for interacting with the session and performing automation tasks.

token.description: The G4 Authentication token used to authenticate the session initiation process. This is required to authorize the session creation.

rule.description: The G4 rule to be executed, including its parameters and configuration.

toolName.description: The unique identifier of the tool (plugin) that defines the rule to be executed.

parameters.description: The parameters to be passed to the rule during execution.

properties.description: Additional properties and configuration for the rule.

driverSession.description: The session key for the browser session from which the rule was executed.

value.description: The result of the rule execution, including any output or response data.
